reviews.review_description: Hi im dark rider and im head mod nice game

Primal Panic is the kind of horror game that scares you, confuses you, and then makes you wonder if you should be laughing or screaming. The moment you load in, the game flexes its upgraded textures like it just got a fresh haircut and wants everyone to notice. The maps are massive, chaotic, and full of “I-should-not-be-here” energy, and the different game modes keep throwing curveballs like the developers had way too much caffeine. It’s spooky, it’s stylish, and it absolutely knows it.
The Mine Monster deserves its own fan club. This thing looks like it crawled out of a cave, drank an energy drink, and decided today was the day it would chase players like rent was due. Its animations are so smooth you almost forget you’re running for your life—almost. And the shop cosmetics? Bro… they go unnecessarily hard. You can dress your character like you’re about to fight evil, go to a rave, or attend a mildly suspicious business meeting. The drip options are elite.
And yes… the legendary booty jiggle effects are in full force. But don’t worry—it’s PG-13 jiggle. Nothing wild, just enough physics to make you go, “Okay who programmed this and why were they having so much fun?” Combined with the monsters, the visuals, and the “I might scream but in a polite way” vibes, Primal Panic ends up being a horror game on a whole new level. If you want spooky chaos with a side of goofy energy, seriously—DOWNLOAD PRIMAL PANIC.🙀
The movement sucks I can hear a heart beat everywhere I go the monster can reach you by the computer looks bad and everything is to bright bad lighting and the game looks very rushed to be out

developer_response.body: Hey we are sorry to hear you dislike the game and you are correct it was rushed to be out but we are making a full revamp with better lighting better movement and patching all the bugs we are sorry you disliked the game if you wanna play again when the remastered verison is out feel free.
